title: Von Stosch (VS) enriched seawater medium solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"18cor","text":"This protocol outlines the steps required to prepare von Stosch (VS) enriched seawater medium modified according to Guiry \u0026 Cunningham (1984).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"95bgl","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"35b0k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"citation","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F15C590BD7F211EE90AD0A58A9FEAC02","title":"Photoperiodic and temperature responses in the reproduction of north-eastern Atlantic Gigartina acicularis (Rhodophyta: Gigartinales)","protocol_guid":"","journal":"Phycologia","date":"1984-01-05T00:00:00Z","created_on":"2026-02-10T22:33:37Z","doi":"https://doi.org/10.2216/i0031-8884-23-3-357.1","authors":"M. D. Guiry \u0026 E. M. Cunningham","can_edit":false}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"btu2t","text":"It is important to follow the order of chemicals added as shown in the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":80}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 5 mg Vitamin B12 Fisher Scientific Catalog #68-19-9 in 500 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users The vitamin B12 stock solution has to be prepared separately to the primary solution and should be stored in the fridge.
In 4 L MilliQ water Contributed by users dissolve:
1.86 g Titriplex® III solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #1099920001 (RRID: Na₂-EDTA 2 H₂O) (Na₂-EDTA 2 H₂O)
21.26 g Sodium Glycerophosphate Contributed by users Catalog #S8041-100GM
0.139 g Iron(II) sulfate heptahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #215422
0.98 g Manganese(II) chloride tetrahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #M3634
20 mL Vitamin B12 stock solution ( 5 mg in 500 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users go to step #1 )
10 mg Potassium iodide Contributed by users
Store VS solution in Duran bottles in a cold and dark setting at 10 °C . Duran® laboratory bottles, with caps (Glass bottle, Duran, Z305197-10EA, 500 ml)
Culturing medium is created by adding 200 mL VS to 10 L sterile seawater Add VS solution to seawater only after it has cooled down.
5 mg Vitamin B12 Fisher Scientific Catalog #68-19-9 in 500 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users
creator: Anton Kuech
